title: Invalid baton with manual-review resume allowed
summary: This fixture should fail because a manual-review baton incorrectly allows bounded resume re-entry.

lineage.rationale: The baton captures bounded follow-up state from the prior QA outcome.

work_object_refs.notes: The baton stays tied to the same bounded task.

planning_record_refs.notes: The baton hands off the current working planning record state.

evidence.summary: The QA report is the direct baton evidence source.

audit.notes: Invalid baton fixture reviewed against the focused baton persistence test.

baton_summary: Stop the bounded retry loop and require manual review.
resume_objective: Preserve the paused state without opening automatic resume behavior.

resume_authority.notes: This is intentionally invalid because manual-review batons must not allow direct resume.

resume_context.notes: The baton retains bounded lineage only.

handoff_notes: Retry ceiling reached; manual review is required before any further bounded work.

pipeline.notes: Baton remains bounded to the admin-only follow-up foundation and does not imply Standard runtime.

scope.summary: Baton scope is limited to the admin-only control kernel, governed work objects, planning records, QA reports, external audit packs, and baton surfaces.
scope.notes: The baton surface remains bounded to persistence and manual follow-up foundations only.
